title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at FedEx India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at FedEx India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at FedEx India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Fleet Manager to strengthen our Dhanbad-based team.

About FedEx India:
FedEx India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in TMS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FedEx India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
